display.purpose: Page titles, hero-level headings. One per view.

headline.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, card titles.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, table cells, descriptions.

mono.purpose: Currency values, stock numbers, code-like data.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default surface shadow for cards, dropdowns.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Raised state for interactive cards on hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action button. Velocity Blue background, white text, medium radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button. White background, bordered, for cancel/alternative actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with bordered style and blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0f172a; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #fff; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2); outline: none; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; background: #f1f5f9; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Vehicle Card
components.description: Vehicle inventory card with premium rounded corners, shadow, and hover lift.
components.html:
Tesla Model 3

Sedan

$44,990

3 in stock
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-card-price { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-btn { margin-top: 0.75rem; width: 100%; }

components.name: In Stock Badge
components.description: Green badge indicating positive status or in-stock state.
components.html: In stock
components.css: .ds-badge-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }

components.name: Category Badge
components.description: Blue badge for vehicle category labels.
components.css: .ds-badge-blue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Top navigation bar with brand mark, nav links, and user menu.
components.html:
DealershipInventory
Y
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; width: 100%; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; } .ds-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; transition: transform 200ms; } .ds-brand:hover .ds-brand-icon { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-brand-line1 { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; display: block; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-brand-line2 { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 0.025em; display: block; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-user-avatar { width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #d9e2ec; color: #334e68; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-logout { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; border: none; background: transparent; color: #475569; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-nav-logout:hover { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Empty state panel for zero-results or empty inventory.
components.html:
No vehicles yet

Add your first vehicle to get started.
components.css: .ds-empty { text-align: center; padding: 4rem 1rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 4rem; height: 4rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f1f5f9; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-empty-icon svg { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-empty-title { margin: 0 0 0.25rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; } .ds-empty-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #94a3b8; }

narrative.overview: Every vehicle on a showroom floor sits in its own pool of light. The space is generous, the surfaces are clean, and each piece has presence. This design system brings that same curation to inventory management: each vehicle card is a spotlighted exhibit, every interaction feels considered, and the interface breathes with the confidence of a premium dealership. The system rejects the clutter of traditional dealership CRMs in favor of automotive-inspired clarity. It's energetic without being chaotic, premium without being cold.
keyCharacteristics: Generous whitespace and deliberate rhythm, like a well-lit showroom
Confident blue anchor color with headroom for palette expansion
Tactile, layered surfaces with purposeful elevation
Fast, responsive micro-interactions that feel instant
Typography-led hierarchy that scales cleanly across devices

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Velocity Blue is the single committed accent across all interactive surfaces. Success/error/warning have their own distinct status colors, but they are semantic, not decorative.

rules.name: The Showroom Lighting Rule
rules.body: Dark text on light surfaces is the norm. Light text on dark backgrounds (Titanium 900, Velocity Blue) is reserved for deliberate contrast moments: the brand mark, inverted buttons, emphasis badges.

rules.name: The Instrument Panel Rule
rules.body: Data values (prices, quantities, stock counts) that need precise scanning get mono type. This creates a visual rhythm where numbers stand out from labels without extra color.

rules.name: The Showroom Pedestal Rule
rules.body: Every interactive card has a resting state, a hover state, and an active state. The shadow difference between them is always exactly one step.

dos: Use Velocity Blue as the single committed accent. Let it carry the interactive identity.
Use generous card padding (1.5rem) for a premium, airy feel.
Use mono type (JetBrains Mono) for prices, stock counts, and data that benefits from precise scanning.
Stagger card entrance animations (60ms delay per card) for a polished page load.
Use showroom-appropriate language: 'in stock' / 'out of stock'.
Respect WCAG 2.1 AAA contrast across all text, status colors, and interactive states.
Use the full titanium neutral range for every surface role.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur as a decorative default.
Don't build identical card grids with icon + heading + text.
Don't use beige or muted palettes.
